rationale.root_cause: In CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad, data is freed at program.c:32 and then freed again at program.c:34 without being reset or transferred, causing a double free. The same pointer from the allocation (around line 29) is used in both frees.
rationale.local_fix: Delete the second free(data) at program.c:34, or set data = NULL immediately after the first free at line 32. Either prevents freeing an already-freed pointer.
rationale.global_fix: Adopt a single-owner cleanup model so each allocation has exactly one responsible free site. Enforce via a dedicated cleanup path or helpers like free_and_null(&ptr) and clear ownership-transfer contracts.
